heading: Our Advantages
intro: Use this section to highlight three reasons clients choose your team, with one featured point emphasized in the center.

items.title: Scalable Delivery
items.text: Flexible workflows and structured onboarding help new teams get started quickly without disrupting existing operations.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.text: Clear package options and visible scope details make it easier to plan budgets, compare tiers, and approve next steps.

items.title: Trusted Support
items.text: Dedicated contacts, response targets, and follow-up reviews keep every project moving with confidence and continuity.
